inputs.label: Base Fare
inputs.businessContext: Initial flag-drop or starting fee for taxi.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial flag-drop or starting fee for taxi.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taksi için ilk açılış ücreti veya başlangıç ücreti
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais de prise en charge ou de départ pour le taxi
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa inicial o banderazo del taxi

businessContext_i18n.tr: Seyahat edilen kilometre başına uygulanan ücret

inputs.label: Cost per Minute
inputs.businessContext: Rate charged per minute for waiting or slow traffic.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rate charged per minute for waiting or slow traffic.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bekleme veya yavaş trafik için dakika başına uygulanan ücret
businessContext_i18n.de: Tarif pro Minute für Wartezeit oder langsamen Verkehr
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tarif appliqué par minute d'attente ou de circulation lente
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa por minuto de espera o tráfico lento
businessContext_i18n.ar: السعر لكل دقيقة انتظار أو حركة مرور بطيئة

inputs.label: Trip Distance
inputs.businessContext: Total distance of the trip in kilometers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distance of the trip in kilometers.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance totale du trajet en kilomètres
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia total del viaje en kilómetros.

inputs.label: Trip Time
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of the trip in minutes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total duration of the trip in minutes.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale du trajet en minutes
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración total del viaje en minutos.

inputs.label: Additional Surcharge
inputs.businessContext: Any extra fees such as airport toll, night charge, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: Any extra fees such as airport toll, night charge, etc.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Havalimanı geçiş ücreti, gece ücreti vb. gibi ek ücretler
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Gebühren wie Flughafenmaut, Nachtzuschlag usw.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais supplémentaires tels que péage aéroportuaire, tarif de nuit, etc.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cualquier tarifa extra como peaje de aeropuerto, cargo nocturno, etc.
businessContext_i18n.ar: أي رسوم إضافية مثل رسوم المطار، رسوم الليل، إلخ.

formulas.totalFare: baseFare + distance * costPerKm + time * costPerMinute + surcharge

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
